notes: Iran are without Alireza Jahanbakhsh (muscle), Dennis Eckert, and Mehdi Torabi (both unspecified), with Roozbeh Cheshmi also a late fitness doubt, and Sardar Azmoun left out for disciplinary reasons — Taremi leads a depleted but functional attack. New Zealand lose Matt Garbett to a confirmed pre-tournament hamstring injury (replaced by Logan Rogerson), Ryan Thomas is also out for the opener, and captain Chris Wood carries fitness concerns after a knee injury kept him out for six months.
